prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your aging parent care forward
items: Schedule a comprehensive geriatric assessment with your parent\
Create a complete list of your parent\
Research and identify warning signs of cognitive decline to monitor in your parent
Conduct a home safety assessment to identify fall risks and mobility hazards
Establish a regular health monitoring routine to track your parent\
